reviews.review_description: Love the concept! Can't wait for more from this developer!

This game is fun but has some glitches. Sometimes when firing a missile it wouldn't go the direction I wanted it to and instead it would like spaz out instead. Another glitch is when after a round when you can spend the money you earned for upgrades and stuff, it wouldn't let me build or upgrade things. Besides those glitches it's a pretty fun and interesting game. But there should be more levels.

reviews.review_title: Runs on S7, not on S10
reviews.review_description: This is a short game which is still pretty impressive on the S7...  worthy of a 4+ rating.  But the devs have not ensured in can run on today's devices, so I cannot recommend it.  If they fix that, it'll be a 4-5 rating.  It's basically a 1st-person tower defense game.  On my S7, it runs nicely, and is fun enough.  On my S10, it crashes to home, 100% of the time, at startup.
Nice job taking  the concept of tower defense to another level (i.e. first person inside a tower) but games like bloons tower defense and others are what i was looking for. This sorta let me down.
The aiming is bad, the scenery makes no sense, the things you have to repair don't make sense at all. It's good to play for one minute I guess.
Not bad for a start, looking forward to more levels.
This app is quite enjoyable and has a lot of potential.
When the Demo end means end don't repeat it.

I like this game. The experience is good, and the game play is easy to figure out with a couple of tries. My one complaint is how short the game is. It looks like a good intro level. Keep up the good work!
It seems to be a demo for now cause I get to a certain part than it just restarts otherwise great game
Cant play it because it keeps closing
